'''Són Halliikeenovich''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] of the [[House Halliikeenovich]], a noble house from the [[planet]] [[Dramassia]] in the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]].

==Biography==
During the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Halliikenovich was a regular patron of the [[Galaxies Opera House/Legends|Galaxies Opera House]]<ref name="CSWE" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He attended the [[Squid Lake/Legends|''Squid Lake'']] production at the [[Galaxies Opera House/Legends|Galaxies Opera House]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. He hoped to gain his House prestige by marrying [[Terr Taneel/Legends|Terr Taneel]] and joining their Houses. If she returned his interest, it was not obvious to the public.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Són Halliikeenovich is a [[tuckerization]] of the name of his portrayer, [[Jason Hallikainen]]. He is the husband of [[Amanda Lucas]], who plays Terr Taneel.<ref name="SW">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-a-family-affair|text=''Star Wars'', A Family Affair|nolive=1}}</ref>
